prompt: A premium editorial portrait featuring a stylish man with a precision mid-fade haircut and a thick trimmed beard. He is positioned in a relaxed three-quarter profile while looking downward with a composed expression. He wears oversized matte black sunglasses with chunky frames and a subtle engraved logo on the temples. His black heavyweight knit sweater has a rich woven texture and slightly loose neckline. His right hand gently crosses his chest to touch the collar, exposing a sophisticated black wristwatch with a brushed silver bezel, black radial dial, and clean white indices. Natural window light from the upper-right softly shapes his facial features while preserving rich contrast in the beard and knit fabric. The backdrop blends a matte cyan-teal upper field with an out-of-focus sandy brown lower section. Hyper-realistic editorial fashion photography, eye-level composition, shallow depth of field, premium magazine cover quality.
promptEn: A premium editorial portrait featuring a stylish man with a precision mid-fade haircut and a thick trimmed beard. He is positioned in a relaxed three-quarter profile while looking downward with a composed expression. He wears oversized matte black sunglasses with chunky frames and a subtle engraved logo on the temples. His black heavyweight knit sweater has a rich woven texture and slightly loose neckline. His right hand gently crosses his chest to touch the collar, exposing a sophisticated black wristwatch with a brushed silver bezel, black radial dial, and clean white indices. Natural window light from the upper-right softly shapes his facial features while preserving rich contrast in the beard and knit fabric. The backdrop blends a matte cyan-teal upper field with an out-of-focus sandy brown lower section. Hyper-realistic editorial fashion photography, eye-level composition, shallow depth of field, premium magazine cover quality.
promptZh: 一张高端杂志风格的肖像照，主角是一位时尚男士，留着精致的渐变短发和修剪整齐的浓密胡须。他以放松的三分之二侧脸姿态示人，目光向下，神情沉稳。他佩戴着 超大哑光黑色太阳镜，镜框厚实，镜腿上有精致的刻印标志。他身穿 黑色重磅针织毛衣，面料纹理丰富，领口略显宽松。他的右手轻轻横过胸前触碰领口，露出一块精致的 黑色腕表，表圈为拉丝银色，配有黑色放射纹表盘和清晰的白色刻度。来自右上方的自然窗光柔和地勾勒出他的面部轮廓，同时保留了胡须和针织面料的丰富对比度。背景融合了哑光青蓝色的上半部分和虚化的沙棕色下半部分。超写实时尚杂志摄影，平视构图，浅景深，高端杂志封面质感。
